response:
Yes, both Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have been members of girl groups.

According to the context:
1.  **Tionne Watkins** (stage name T-Boz) rose to fame in the early 1990s as a member of the American girl group **TLC**.
2.  **Park So-yeon** (stage name Soyeon) is best known as the former main vocalist and member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**.

Therefore, both individuals have been members of girl groups.
